subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Ever is the thought of 'Abdu'l-Bahá this, and His contemplation this: that souls in the field [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی همیشه اندیشه عبدالبهاء اینست و فکر آن این که نفوسی در میدان
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @exalting the Word of God in teaching the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
